Our Services

Comprehensive forensic auditing across all business costs

We provide specialized forensic auditing services across 8 key cost categories, identifying overcharges and optimizing expenses to maximize your business savings.

⚡

Energy Audits

Comprehensive electricity, gas, and renewable energy cost analysis to identify billing discrepancies and optimize energy expenses.

Learn more →
♻️

Waste Management

Detailed waste collection, disposal, and recycling cost verification to ensure accurate billing and service optimization.

Learn more →
💳

Banking & Finance

Bank charges, loan fees, and financial service cost analysis to recover overcharged amounts and optimize banking relationships.

Learn more →
📡

Telecoms & Broadband

Mobile, landline, and internet service cost verification to identify billing discrepancies and contract optimization opportunities.

Learn more →
🚗

Fleet & Fuel

Vehicle leasing, fuel, and maintenance cost analysis for fleet optimization and overcharge recovery across all transport expenses.

Learn more →
🛡️

Insurance & Rates

Insurance premium and claims cost verification to ensure fair pricing and proper coverage across all business insurance categories.

Learn more →
🏢

Property & Facilities

Property maintenance, service charges, and facility management cost analysis to optimize all property-related expenses.

Learn more →
📊

Complete Audit

Comprehensive forensic audit across all 8 cost categories for maximum savings identification and business-wide optimization.

Learn more →
Why Choose Foxlite

Proven expertise across all business cost categories

🔍

Forensic Expertise

Deep forensic analysis capabilities with VeriTech 10 Certification and EU AI Act compliance.

💰

No Risk Pricing

Free audits with payment only on results. 25% of recoveries vs. industry standard 50%.

📈

Proven Results

Established since 2019 with comprehensive coverage across all business cost categories.

Ready to start saving?

Contact us for a free consultation. Choose individual service audits or our comprehensive complete audit across all cost categories.
